narrative:
Precinct Chesapeake A (precinct in Lawrence County) has 181 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.5 percentage points.
